coffeeList.description: A cappuccino is an approximately 150 ml (5 oz) beverage, with 25 ml of espresso coffee and 85ml of fresh milk the fo...

coffeeList.name: Flat White
coffeeList.description: Flat white is a coffee drink consisting of espresso with microfoam, a velvety steamed milk. It is generally smaller than a latte.

coffeeList.name: Cappuccino
coffeeList.description: Cappuccino is an espresso-based coffee drink that originated in Italy, prepared with steamed milk foam. It is traditionally small.

coffeeList.name: Americano
coffeeList.description: Caffè Americano is a style of espresso prepared by diluting an espresso shot with hot water, giving it a similar strength but different flavor.

coffeeList.name: Latte
coffeeList.description: A latte is a coffee drink made with espresso and steamed milk. It is a popular choice for those who enjoy a creamy and mild coffee flavor.

coffeeList.name: Machiato
coffeeList.description: A macchiato is an espresso coffee drink with a small amount of milk, usually foamed. It is stronger than a cappuccino but lighter than a plain espresso.
